configuration.discounting: social_discount_rate sampled per LHS draw; undiscounted ledgers retained
configuration.notice: Simulation-based policy experiment; not an empirical forecast.
research_only_metrics: Latent-truth incidence/severity and evaluator intent metrics are ex-post only.
They are never passed into firm, consumer, investor, workforce, hub, connector, or regulator decisions.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> larger sanction bases -> more deterrence, possibly more greenhushing.
sampled_parameters.justification: Bridge between simulation-scale balances and the statutory turnover-based ceiling rates (Part I.1).
sampled_parameters.name: sim_turnover_balance_multiple
sampled_parameters.source: Asset-turnover ratios of listed EU non-financials cluster roughly between 0.5 and 2 (order-of-magnitude reference class from standard financial-statement analysis); No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> stronger deterrence of profitable overstatement.
sampled_parameters.justification: Disgorgement-plus factor on the estimated benefit of the misleading claim.
sampled_parameters.name: benefit_multiplier
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> larger penalties for high-exposure channels.
sampled_parameters.justification: Revenue-linked component of the experimental sanction formula.
sampled_parameters.name: affected_revenue_rate
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> more coverage, more false positives possible.
sampled_parameters.justification: Screening capacity per reporting period.
sampled_parameters.name: evidence_request_capacity
sampled_parameters.source: EU consumer-protection authorities decide tens to a few hundred misleading-advertising cases per year against far larger claim volumes (order of magnitude from published CPC network sweeps); No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> shorter queues, faster decisions.
sampled_parameters.justification: Formal-investigation capacity per period, shared with conflict investigations (Part J).
sampled_parameters.name: investigation_capacity
sampled_parameters.source: Formal proceedings are an order of magnitude rarer than screenings (same reference class as CAP-01); No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> better coverage of low-risk-score abuse, more capacity spent on clean claims.
sampled_parameters.justification: Random-surveillance draw deterring pure risk-score gaming.
sampled_parameters.name: random_surveillance_share
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Longer -> slower correction, more exposure days.
sampled_parameters.justification: First-time correctable errors receive this compliance window.
sampled_parameters.name: correction_window_days
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> less overstatement AND more greenhushing (chilling).
sampled_parameters.justification: Perceived enforcement strictness entering the corporate communication optimizer.
sampled_parameters.name: regulatory_strictness
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> faster dispute resolution, fewer enforcement slots.
sampled_parameters.justification: Investigation-capacity share reserved for evidence-conflict disputes (dedicated data-dispute desk).
sampled_parameters.name: conflict_capacity_share
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Longer -> longer exposure of disputed records.
sampled_parameters.justification: Procedural duration of one conflict investigation.
sampled_parameters.name: conflict_resolution_days
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> more drafts screened (ITT effect grows).
sampled_parameters.justification: Scales every strategy's voluntary participation propensity.
sampled_parameters.name: hub_participation_scale
sampled_parameters.source: Baseline uptakes (0.90/0.60/0.35 by strategy) have no empirical source; No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> more flags, more revisions AND more withdrawals (greenhushing).
sampled_parameters.justification: Issue-severity threshold scaling of the screening algorithm.
sampled_parameters.name: hub_strictness
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> more burden on truthful firms, more withdrawal.
sampled_parameters.justification: Spurious-flag probability of the screening algorithm.
sampled_parameters.name: hub_noise
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Longer -> later publication, larger reporting delay.
sampled_parameters.justification: Operational review delay withholding drafts from publication.
sampled_parameters.name: hub_processing_delay_days
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Lower -> weaker reconciliation power, more incomplete-coverage classifications.
sampled_parameters.justification: Scales each register's observational coverage (clamped to [0.05, 1]).
sampled_parameters.name: connector_coverage_scale
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> more false conflicts, more dispute load.
sampled_parameters.justification: Wrong facility/firm matching probability per transfer.
sampled_parameters.name: connector_mismatch_probability
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> more erroneous evidence, more conflicts.
sampled_parameters.justification: Register-error probability per transfer (correction lifecycle follows).
sampled_parameters.name: connector_register_error_probability
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> wider comparability error bands.
sampled_parameters.justification: Probability a transfer returns a genuinely old reading.
sampled_parameters.name: connector_stale_probability
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> fewer transfers, weaker reconciliation.
sampled_parameters.justification: Per-period-and-source downtime probability.
sampled_parameters.name: connector_downtime_probability
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Longer -> slower conflict resolution under Regime C.
sampled_parameters.justification: Register-error correction turnaround (also answers supervisory re-verification requests).
sampled_parameters.name: connector_correction_delay_days
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> larger demand response to green claims and discrepancies.
sampled_parameters.justification: Scales every segment's environmental preference.
sampled_parameters.name: consumer_preference_scale
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> greenwashing-to-demand channel strengthens.
sampled_parameters.justification: Scales the utility penalty of a perceived claim/evidence divergence.
sampled_parameters.name: consumer_discrepancy_sensitivity
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> faster price incorporation of controversies.
sampled_parameters.justification: Share of fundamentalists inspecting linked evidence.
sampled_parameters.name: investor_sophisticated_fraction
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> larger valuation response to published decisions.
sampled_parameters.justification: Scales the controversy discount in investor fair values.
sampled_parameters.name: investor_controversy_scale
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> stronger turnover/productivity response.
sampled_parameters.justification: Trust lost per unit of observable internal discrepancy.
sampled_parameters.name: workforce_trust_loss_rate
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> faster rehabilitation after incidents.
sampled_parameters.justification: Daily recovery toward the 0.85 anchor on quiet truthful days.
sampled_parameters.name: workforce_trust_recovery_rate
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> more greenhushing at given strictness.
sampled_parameters.justification: Scales the perceived compliance burden that chills voluntary truthful communication (greenhushing driver).
sampled_parameters.name: compliance_burden_scale
sampled_parameters.source: No direct empirical calibration; scenario range used for sensitivity analysis.

sampled_parameters.expected_direction: Higher -> later harms/costs matter less; can flip rankings on long horizons.
sampled_parameters.justification: Discounts policy costs and exposure-weighted harm for comparison; undiscounted ledgers always preserved.
sampled_parameters.name: social_discount_rate
sampled_parameters.source: European Commission Better Regulation Toolbox (Tool #61 discounting guidance, ~3%/yr social discount rate) -- reference class, not an estimate for this model

seed_schedule.common_random_numbers: both seeds reset for every regime within a replication
